**Current Status:**

Spinal Muscular Atrophy is a genetic disorder that affects the nerve cells responsible for controlling voluntary muscle movement. While there is no definitive cure yet, significant progress has been made in developing treatments that can improve symptoms and quality of life for individuals with SMA.
